case_title: EDUARDO A. LAZO VS. BRANDON GENE WEBSTER et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO TREVOR GILES, AND ANTHONY SCOTT GILES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-29-2013 AT 10:00 AM.
ORDER (SC-225) ORDER OR DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS: THE COURT ORDERS: [X] THE PAYMENT ORDER REFERRED TO IN [X] IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAZO, EDUARDO A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBSTER, BRANDON GENE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,634.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TREVOR GILES AND ANTHONY GENES ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT WEBSTER, BRANDON GENE HEARING SET FOR SEP-22-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2014 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-26-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAID HE IS GOING TO FILE A BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDINGS. DEFENDANT TO BRING HIS INCOME TAX RETURNS FOR LAST FEW YEARS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
